info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud OCR (VIAPI) proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud OCR (VIAPI) API

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the RecognizeBankCard API. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeBankCard and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: Image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via an OSS link outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

BankName.description: Bank name. If detection fails, an empty string is returned.

CardType.description:
Bank card type. Valid values:  
- CC: Credit card  
- SCC: Semi-credit card  
- DCC: Combined deposit and credit card  
- DC: Debit card  
- PC: Prepaid card

ValidDate.description: Validity period. If detection fails, an empty string is returned. If multiple validity periods exist, they are separated by commas, such as `03/17,04/05`.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of RecognizeBusinessLicense. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeBusinessLicense and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Address.description: The company address. Returns `FailInRecognition` if recognition fails.
Address.example: 浙江省杭州市西湖区转塘科技经济区块888号888幢

Angle.description: The rotation angle (clockwise) of the input image. Valid enumeration values are: 0, 90, 180, and 270.

Business.description: Business scope. Returns `FailInRecognition` if recognition fails.
Business.example: 网络技术服务；网站建设；销售：I类医疗器械、保健用品（不含保健食品）等

Capital.description: Registered capital. Returns `FailInRecognition` if detection fails.

Emblem.description: Position of the national emblem. Returns `FailInDetection` if detection fails.

Left.description: The x-coordinate of the top-left corner of the area.

Top.description: The y-coordinate of the top-left corner of the area.

EstablishDate.description: Company registration date. For example, if the certificate shows “2014年04月16日”, the API returns “20140416”.

LegalPerson.description: Legal representative of the company. Returns `FailInRecognition` if detection fails.

Name.description: Company name. Returns `FailInRecognition` if detection fails.
Name.example: 某某电子商务有限公司

QRCode.description: QR code location. Returns `FailInDetection` if detection fails.

Left.description: X coordinate of the top-left corner of the area.

Top.description: Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the area.

RegisterNumber.description: Unified Social Credit Code. Returns `FailInRecognition` if detection fails.

Stamp.description: The position of the stamp. Returns `FailInDetection` if detection fails.

Left.description: The x coordinate of the top-left corner of the area.

Top.description: The y coordinate of the top-left corner of the area.

Title.description: The position of the title. Returns `FailInDetection` if detection fails.

Left.description: The x coordinate of the top-left corner of the area.

Top.description: The y coordinate of the top-left corner of the area.

Type.description: Company type. Returns `FailInRecognition` if detection fails.

ValidPeriod.description:
The termination date of the company's business term. For example, if the certificate shows "April 16, 2014 to April 15, 2034," the API returns "20340415".

> The current algorithm outputs all dates in the "YYYYMMDD" format (for example, "20391130") and uses "29991231" to represent "long-term".

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the RecognizeCharacter API for general text recognition. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeCharacter and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or using OSS links outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

MinHeight.description: The minimum height of text in the image, in pixels.

OutputProbability.description:
Specifies whether to output the probability of the text bounding box. Valid values:

- true: Output the probability of the text bounding box.
- false: Do not output the probability of the text bounding box.

Data.description: The Content of the returned Result Data.

Probability.description: The probability of the text content, with a value range from 0 to 1.

TextRectangles.description: The position of the text area bounding box.

Angle.description:
The angle of the text area, within the range `[-180, 180]` degrees.  

> The rotation is centered at the centroid of the text area. A positive angle indicates clockwise rotation, and a negative angle indicates counterclockwise rotation.

Height.description: The height of the text area.

Left.description:
The x-coordinate of the top-left corner of the text area.  
> We do not recommend using this field to compute the text area. For coordinate information of the text area, refer to the pos field.

Pos.description: The coordinates of the four corners of the outer rectangle of the text area, listed in clockwise order (top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left).

x.description: The x value of the text area.

y.description: The y value of the text area.

Top.description:
The y-coordinate of the top-left corner of the text area.  
> We do not recommend using this field to compute the text area. For coordinate information of the text area, refer to the pos field.

Width.description: The width of the text area.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the RecognizeDriverLicense API. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeDriverLicense and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Side.description:
The uploaded photo is either the home page or the supplementary page of the driver's license.

- face: home page

- back: supplementary page

Address.example: 江苏省徐州市铜山区棠张镇田河村1队129号

EndDate.description: Duration or end date of the driver license validity period, depending on the data format of the driver license. Format: YYYYMMDD, for example, 19800101 represents January 1, 1980.

IssueDate.description: Initial issue date. Format: YYYYMMDD, for example, 19800101 represents January 1, 1980.

IssueUnit.example: 江苏省徐州市公安局交通巡逻警察支队

StartDate.description: Start time of the driver license validity period, in the format YYYYMMDD, for example, 19800101 represents January 1, 1980.

VehicleType.description: Vehicle types authorized by the driver license.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the RecognizeDrivingLicense API. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeDrivingLicense and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image. We recommend using an OSS Link in the China (Shanghai) Region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Side.description:
Upload an image of either the home page or the supplementary page of the vehicle license.

- face: home page

- back: supplementary page

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

BackResult.description: Supplementary page result of the vehicle license.

FaceResult.description: The result of the vehicle license home page.

IssueDate.description: Issue date, in the format YYYYMMDD. For example, 19800101 represents January 1, 1980.

RegisterDate.description: Registration date, in the format YYYYMMDD. For example, 19800101 represents January 1, 1980.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of RecognizeIdentityCard for identity card recognition. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeIdentityCard and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Side.description:
Type of the ID card side:  

- face: portrait side  
- back: national emblem side

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

BackResult.description: Result from the national emblem side.

EndDate.description: End date of the validity period, in the format YYYYMMDD. For example, 19800101 represents January 1, 1980.

StartDate.description: Start date of the validity period, in the format YYYYMMDD. For example, 19800101 represents January 1, 1980.

Address.example: 江苏省南京市浦口区天天小区1栋11号

BirthDate.description: Date of birth, in the format YYYYMMDD. For example, 19800101 represents January 1, 1980.

CardAreas.description: ID card area location, represented by four vertices in counter-clockwise order: top-left, bottom-left, bottom-right, top-right.

X.description: The x-coordinate of the ID card area.

Y.description: The y-coordinate of the ID card area.

FaceRectVertices.description: Face location, represented by four vertices in counter-clockwise order: bottom-left, bottom-right, top-right, top-left.

X.description: X coordinate of the face location.

Y.description: Y coordinate of the face location.

Angle.description: The degree of clockwise rotation of the rectangle, ranging from -180 to 180.

Center.description: Center coordinate of the face rectangle.

X.description: Horizontal coordinate of the center of the face rectangle.

Y.description: Vertical coordinate of the center of the face rectangle.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the RecognizeLicensePlate API. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeLicensePlate and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The License Plate Recognition service currently supports the Shanghai and Shenzhen Regions. If you selected the Shanghai Region when activating the service, we recommend using an OSS link in the Shanghai Region. For files stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the Shanghai Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~). If you selected the Shenzhen Region when activating the service, only OSS links in the Shenzhen Region are supported for invocation.

Plates.description: Detailed information about the license plate panel.

Confidence.description: Confidence level of the license plate number, with a value range from 0 to 1.

PlateType.description: License plate type. Includes: small vehicle, new energy vehicle, large vehicle, trailer, instructor vehicle, police vehicle, military vehicle, diplomatic vehicle, Hong Kong and Macao vehicle.

PlateTypeConfidence.description: Confidence level of the license plate type. Value range: 0 to 1.

Positions.description: Position information of the license plate detection bounding box. The coordinates of the four corners of the rectangle are listed clockwise: top-left XY coordinates, top-right XY coordinates, bottom-right XY coordinates, bottom-left XY coordinates.

X.description: X coordinate of the top-left corner of the license plate.

Y.description: Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the license plate.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of QR code recognition (RecognizeQrCode). The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeQrCode and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image to be detected. Each element in the JSON array is an image detection task struct (image Table). Up to 10 elements are supported, meaning you can detect up to 10 images simultaneously. We recommend using OSS links in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or using OSS links outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Elements.description: The element information returned by detection.

ImageURL.description: The image URL address from the corresponding request.

Results.description: The return result. When the invocation succeeds, the result contains one or more elements.

Label.description:
The categorization of the detection result. Valid values include:

- normal: Normal image.

- qrcode: Image containing a QR code.

- programCode: Image containing a miniapp code.

> By default, miniapp codes are not detected. If you need this feature, contact us via DingTalk group (23109592).

items.description:
When the image contains a QR code, this field returns the text information (URL or plain text) embedded in each QR code.

> Not all QR code images can be successfully decoded to extract the corresponding URL or text.
- When **Suggestion** is `review`, it indicates that the detected QR code does not contain identifiable URL or text information, and **QrCodesData** will not include any related details.
- When **Suggestion** is `block`, the corresponding URL or text extracted from the detected QR code will be included in **QrCodesData**.

Rate.description: The probability of the result belonging to this category, with a value range of `[0.00–100.00]`. A higher value indicates a greater probability of belonging to this category.

Suggestion.description:
The operation recommended for you to execute. Valid values:

- pass: The image is normal and requires no further action.

- review: The detection result is uncertain and requires manual review.

- block: The image violates policies, and further actions (such as direct deletion or restriction) are recommended.

TaskId.description: The ID of the detection job.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of RecognizeQuotaInvoice. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeQuotaInvoice and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via an OSS link in a different region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Angle.description: The angle by which the invoice is rotated. The value ranges from 0 to 360. A value of 0 indicates upward orientation, 90 indicates right, 180 indicates downward, and 270 indicates left.

InvoiceDetails.example: 税务局代码：国税，行政区划代码：深圳市，年份：2018，发票行业代码：None，发票类别代码：None，金额版：万元版，批次号：03

Height.description: Height of the receipt after rotation.

ValuePositions.description: Position information of the detected field. The coordinates of the four corners are listed in clockwise order.

X.description: X coordinate of the bounding rectangle.

Y.description: Y coordinate of the bounding rectangle.

ValueScore.description: Confidence level of the detected **Value**, ranging from 0 to 100.

Width.description: The width of the receipt after rotation.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of table recognition (RecognizeTable). The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeTable and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

AssureDirection.description:
Indicates whether the Image orientation is confirmed to be upright.

- true: Upright

- false: Inverted

HasLine.description:
Indicates whether the table has no lines.

- true: No lines, or only horizontal lines without VERTICAL LINEs

- false: Has lines

ImageURL.description: The Image URL. We recommend using an OSS Link in the China (Shanghai) Region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

OutputFormat.description: The output format is `json`. (`html` and `xlsx` are deprecated. If you specify `html` or `xlsx` as the input parameter, the output will still be in JSON format.)

SkipDetection.description:
Indicates whether to skip Detection.

- true: Skip Detection

- false: Do not skip Detection

UseFinanceModel.description:
Indicates whether to use the financial report model.

- true: Financial report model

- false: Non-financial report model

FileContent.description: The request parameters `html` and `xlsx` are deprecated. Data is output in JSON format by default.

Tables.description: Data in JSON format. This field appears only when the Request parameter OutputFormat is set to `json`.

items.description: Table header information.

EndColumn.description: The number of columns (colspan) occupied by the cell is ex-sx.

EndRow.description: The number of rows occupied by the cell (rowspan) is ey - sy.

Height.description: The height of the cell in the image.

StartColumn.description: The starting column ID of the cell.

StartRow.description: The starting row ID of the cell.

items.description: Text, where each line (row) of text is a block.

Width.description: The width of the cell in the image.

items.description: Table footer information.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the RecognizeTaxiInvoice API. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeTaxiInvoice and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Invoices.description: Detailed information of the invoice list.

X.description: The X coordinate of the top-left corner of the invoice.

Y.description: The Y coordinate of the top-left corner of the invoice.

Items.description: The text list of each invoice.

ItemRoi.description: The positional information corresponding to each field in the invoice.

Angle.description: Angle information. The origin of the coordinate system is at the top-left corner, and the direction parallel to the x-axis has an angle of 0 degrees. Counterclockwise rotation yields negative angles, and clockwise rotation yields positive angles. The angle represents the number of degrees between the horizontal axis (x-axis) and the first edge encountered when rotating clockwise. The angle range is from -180° to 180°.

Center.description: The centroid of the bounding box.

X.description: The x-coordinate of the centroid of the bounding box.

Y.description: The y-coordinate of the centroid of the bounding box.

Size.description: The width and height of the bounding box.

Text.description: Information of each field on the invoice.

RotateType.description:
The rotation degree of the invoice.  

- 0: No rotation required.  

- 1: Rotate 90 degrees clockwise.  

- 2: Rotate 180 degrees clockwise.  

- 3: Rotate 270 degrees clockwise.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of RecognizeTicketInvoice for value-added tax (VAT) invoice volume detection. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeTicketInvoice and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The URL of the image. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via OSS links in other regions, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

Height.description: The height of the invoice after rotation.

OrgHeight.description: The original height of the image.

OrgWidth.description: The width of the original image.

Index.description: The index of the invoice in the image.

Key.description: The name of the detected field.

Value.description: The value of the detected field.

ValuePositions.description: Position information of the detected field. The coordinates of the four corners are listed in clockwise order.

X.description: X coordinate of the bounding box.

Y.description: Y coordinate of the bounding box.

ValueScore.description: The confidence level of the detected **Value**, ranging from 0 to 100.

SliceRectangle.description: The coordinates of the four corners of the receipt detection bounding box, listed in clockwise order.

X.description: The X coordinate of the bounding box.

Y.description: The Y coordinate of the bounding box.

Type.description:
The type of receipt. The following types are supported:  

- VAT invoice  
- Taxi receipt  
- Fixed-amount invoice  
- Motor vehicle sales invoice  
- Volume invoice

Width.description: The width of the invoice after rotation.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the RecognizeTrainTicket API. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeTrainTicket and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

ImageURL.description: The Image URL. We recommend using an OSS Link in the Shanghai Region. For files stored locally or on an OSS instance outside the Shanghai Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the RecognizeVATInvoice API. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeVATInvoice and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

FileType.description: The input image format parameter must be fixed as `jpg`.

FileURL.description: The image URL. We recommend using an OSS link in the China (Shanghai) region. If your file is stored locally or in an OSS bucket outside the China (Shanghai) region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The content of the returned result data.

Box.description: Bounding box coordinates of invoice keywords, in the format [x-axis coordinate of the top-left point, y-axis coordinate of the top-left point, x-axis coordinate of the bottom-right point, y-axis coordinate of the bottom-right point].

items.description: Position box information for the reviewer.
Position box information for the invoice issuer.
Bounding box information for the total amount including tax.
Position box information for the invoice code.
Position box information for the invoice date.
Position box information for the validation code.
Position box information for the invoice number.
Position box information for the name of goods, taxable labor, or service.
Position box information for the purchaser's address and telephone number.
Position box information for the purchaser's bank name and account.
Position box information for the purchaser's name.
Bounding box information for the seller's taxpayer registration number.
Position box information for the payee.
Bounding box information for the seller's address and telephone number.
Position box information for the seller's bank name and account.
Position box information for the purchaser name.
Bounding box information for the purchaser's taxpayer identification number.
Position box information for the total amount including tax.
Position box information for the total tax amount.
Position box information for the total amount excluding tax.

Content.description: Detects invoice items and aggregates the total amount.

items.description: Name of goods, taxable labor, or service.

PayeeAddress.example: 上海虹桥机场迎宾二路161号22342185

PayeeBankName.description: Payee's bank name and account number.

PayeeName.example: 上海机场（集团）有限公司

PayerAddress.example: 浙江省杭州市西湖区杭大路9号聚龙大厦西区15-18楼0571-87901580

PayerBankName.description: Purchaser's bank name and account number.

PayerName.example: 三号技术有限责任公司

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the VIN code recognition API (RecognizeVINCode). The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=RecognizeVINCode and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

parameters.description: The Image URL. We recommend using an OSS Link in the China (Shanghai) Region. For files stored locally or via an OSS Link in a different Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).
parameters.name: ImageURL

schema.description: The Image URL. We recommend using an OSS Link in the China (Shanghai) Region. For files stored locally or via an OSS Link in a different Region, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The Content of the returned Result Data.
